MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mr. Michael Mazzacone, counsel on behalf of plaintiff.

Mr. Michael Mazzacone appeared and represents to the Court requests that he and Mr. David McKim, counsel on behalf of defendant, agreed to continue this hearing to April 22, 2010 at 8:30am. The Court grants the request. Today's hearing is vacated.

Notice Of Hearing On Pltf Martel Toler'S Objection To Undertaking Of Private Sureties Posted By Deft. Simon David Aviel Pursuant To Ccp Section 995.910 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Apr-02-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Mazzacone, counsel for plaintiff; Mr. Martel Toler, Plaintiff; Mr. David McKim, counsel for defendant; Mr. Simon David Aviel, Defendant.

The Court adopts it's tentative ruling as follows: The Court sustains Plaintiff Martel Toler's Objection to Undertaking of Private Sureties posted by defendant, Simon David Aviel Pursuant to CCP Sections 995.910 et seq and Striking the Undertaking.
